SEARCH
Package client.app

Class Session

java.lang.Object
client.app.Session
public class Session extends Object
Holds connection details and the logged-in identity for the lifetime of the client process. One instance is created in GoNatureClientApp and passed around via the FXMLLoader controller factory.

Exactly one of user (staff) or visitor is non-null while logged in; both are null when logged out. The convenience getters (isStaff(), getRole(), getActorId(), …) read off whichever is set, so callers can stay agnostic about which kind logged in.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private ClientConnection
    connection
    The active server connection, or null before connecting.
    private String
    host
    The host the client connected to.
    private int
    port
    The port the client connected to.
    private UserDTO
    user
    The logged-in staff user (staff login), or null.
    private VisitorDTO
    visitor
    The logged-in visitor (visitor login-by-ID), or null.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Session()
    Creates an empty session with no connection or identity yet.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clearIdentity()
    Drops the logged-in identity (on logout) so the next user starts clean.
    void
    closeConnection()
    Closes the active connection, if any (called on logout/shutdown).
    long
    getActorId()
    Returns the logged-in actor's id (the user id for staff, the national id for a visitor), or -1 if logged out.
    ClientConnection
    getConnection()
    Returns the active connection, or null if not connected.
    String
    getDisplayName()
    Returns the display name of whoever is logged in, or "" if no one.
    String
    getHost()
    Returns the host the client connected to.
    Integer
    getParkId()
    Returns the park id the staff user belongs to, or null for non-park staff, visitors, or when logged out.
    int
    getPort()
    Returns the port the client connected to.
    Role
    getRole()
    Returns the staff role, or null for a visitor / when logged out.
    String
    getRoleLabel()
    Returns a short chrome label for the logged-in identity: the staff role name for staff, "Subscriber"/"Visitor" for visitors, or "" when logged out.
    UserDTO
    getUser()
    Returns the logged-in staff user, or null if none/visitor.
    VisitorDTO
    getVisitor()
    Returns the logged-in visitor, or null if none/staff.
    boolean
    isLoggedIn()
    Returns true if any identity (staff or visitor) is logged in.
    boolean
    isStaff()
    Returns true if a staff user is logged in.
    boolean
    isVisitor()
    Returns true if a visitor is logged in.
    void
    login(ClientConnection conn, String host, int port)
    Promotes a freshly probed connection into the session (connection screen).
    void
    setUser(UserDTO user)
    Records a successful staff login (clears any visitor identity).
    void
    setVisitor(VisitorDTO visitor)
    Records a successful visitor login (clears any staff identity).

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • getConnection

      public ClientConnection getConnection()
      Returns the active connection, or null if not connected.

      Returns the host the client connected to.

      the host the client connected to

    • getPort

      public int getPort()
      Returns the port the client connected to.
      Returns:
      the port the client connected to

    • login

      public void login(ClientConnection conn, String host, int port)
      Promotes a freshly probed connection into the session (connection screen).
      Parameters:
      conn - the opened connection to adopt
      host - the host it connects to
      port - the port it connects to

    • setUser

      public void setUser(UserDTO user)
      Records a successful staff login (clears any visitor identity).
      Parameters:
      user - the authenticated staff user

    • setVisitor

      public void setVisitor(VisitorDTO visitor)
      Records a successful visitor login (clears any staff identity).
      Parameters:
      visitor - the authenticated visitor

    • clearIdentity

      public void clearIdentity()
      Drops the logged-in identity (on logout) so the next user starts clean.

    • getUser

      public UserDTO getUser()
      Returns the logged-in staff user, or null if none/visitor.
      Returns:
      the logged-in staff user, or null if none/visitor

    • getVisitor

      public VisitorDTO getVisitor()
      Returns the logged-in visitor, or null if none/staff.
      Returns:
      the logged-in visitor, or null if none/staff

    • isStaff

      public boolean isStaff()
      Returns true if a staff user is logged in.
      Returns:

      public boolean isVisitor()
      Returns true if a visitor is logged in.
      Returns:

      public boolean isLoggedIn()
      Returns true if any identity (staff or visitor) is logged in.
      Returns:
      true if any identity (staff or visitor) is logged in

      Returns the logged-in actor's id (the user id for staff, the national id for a visitor), or -1 if logged out.

      Returns the display name of whoever is logged in, or "" if no one.

    • getRoleLabel

      public String getRoleLabel()
      Returns a short chrome label for the logged-in identity: the staff role name for staff, "Subscriber"/"Visitor" for visitors, or "" when logged out.
      Returns:
      a short chrome label for the logged-in identity: the staff role name for staff, "Subscriber"/"Visitor" for visitors, or "" when logged out
